name: Platform Capability Evidence Fixture Probe
description: Local Roadmap K fixture for FIM baseline/change semantics, inventory freshness and CPE/CVE mapping, per-control compliance evidence, and SIEM delivery ack/cursor semantics.
claim_boundary: Local platform capability evidence fixture only. Does not prove live endpoint FIM collection, inventory freshness from real agents, compliance posture, or acknowledged delivery to an external SIEM.

tests.name: FIM fixture records baseline, changed hash, modifier context, and compliance impact
Inventory fixture carries freshness, normalized host/software fields, and CPE/CVE mapping
Compliance fixture uses per-control hashed evidence and no synthetic score
SIEM fixture records schema, delivery ack, cursor, and no duplicate event id
